items.example: We should recycle plastic, glass and paper.
Air pollution is a serious problem in big cities.
Solar and wind power are types of renewable energy.
Greenhouse gases trap heat in the atmosphere.
We need to reduce the amount of waste we produce.
We must protect the environment for future generations.
Climate change is causing more extreme weather.
The house runs entirely on solar power.
Taking public transport reduces your carbon footprint.
We need more sustainable ways of living.
